# Figma AI Agent Daemon Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/figmaboundarydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Riido task: RIID-4813.

This is the daemon-side projection of Figma AI Agent UI evidence. The canonical UI coverage owner remains `riido-contracts`; daemon records only executable assignment, runtime, liveness, lifecycle, and provider-input boundaries.

Executable manifest: [`figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.riido.json`](figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.riido.json), schema `riido-figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.v1`.

- draft warning: No onboarding draft execution ownership. The revised order lets clients collect a local agent draft/configuration before runtime and workspace selection; daemon only consumes the final SaaS-authorized assignment/runtime/model/instruction snapshot after workspace_id and runtime_id are known.
- vocabulary warning: fixture is not a daemon template entity
- loop direction: Top-down and Bottom-up changes stay explicit
